name: Chocolate Mint Meltaways
recipeInstructions:
COOKIES:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Melt 1 cup of mint chocolate chips over hot (not boiling) water until smooth. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine butter, confectioners' sugar, and egg yolk. Beat until creamy.
4. Add melted chips and flour; beat until well blended.
5. Drop by heaping teaspoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F for 8 to 10 minutes. Allow to stand for 3 minutes before removing from cookie sheets.
7. Cool completely on wire racks.
GLAZE:
1. Combine the remaining 1/2 cup of mint chocolate chips and vegetable shortening over hot (not boiling) water until chips are melted and mixture is smooth.
2. Drizzle each cookie with 1/2 teaspoon of the glaze.
3. Sprinkle with toasted, chopped almonds.
4. Chill until set.
5. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
